title: narcissus foliosus
intro: Narcissus foliosus, also known as the autumn-flowering daffodil, is a perennial plant in the Amaryllidaceae family, characterized by its showy, bell-shaped flowers and narrow, strap-like leaves. Traditionally, Narcissus foliosus has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its potential to treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma due to its expectorant and antispasmodic effects. The plant's health benefits also include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and act as a natural antiseptic. Narcissus foliosus can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions for its medicinal use, although its safety and efficacy require further scientific study and regulation.
